title: Manim Portable Plugin Manifest
description: A portable, language-neutral description of the shareable subset of a manim plugin: color palettes, rate functions (as expressions), parametric surfaces (as expressions), and SVG shape libraries. Loaded by both ecmanim (TypeScript) and Python manim via thin adapters.

colors.description: Named colors. Each value is a hex string (#rgb or #rrggbb, optionally #rrggbbaa).

rateFunctions.description: Named easing/rate functions. Each value is an expression in the single variable `t` (0..1). See README for the expression grammar.

surfaces.description: Named parametric surfaces. Each maps parameters (u, v) to a 3D point via three coordinate expressions.

x.description: Expression in u and v giving the X coordinate.

y.description: Expression in u and v giving the Y coordinate.

z.description: Expression in u and v giving the Z coordinate.

fillColor.description: Optional fill color (hex or a name defined in this manifest's `colors`).

shapes.description: Named SVG shape library. Each value is a complete SVG document string, e.g. "<svg ...>...</svg>".
